name: penumbra
description: [DEPRECATED — out-of-process image-blit fallback] Penumbra-in-Rhino live preview suite. Drives the legacy OUT-OF-PROCESS overlay (PenumbraOopShow, formerly PenumbraShow) + the CPig Penumbra Preview component, gating captures on a real (non-companion) frame via WaitForPenumbraFrame. Superseded by the in-process GLSL studio (PenumbraGl — no Canary rhino suite yet); KEPT only because it still uniquely covers the CPig→Penumbra live-preview chain until the GLSL path's CPig integration lands. Requires the Penumbra Rhino plug-in registered for auto-load (like kbridge requires KinematicImporter). Per docs/plans/2026-06-13-rhino-preview-autonomous-hardening.md in the Penumbra repo.
